title: descurainia incisa subsp. filipes
intro: Descurainia incisa subsp. filipes, also known as the narrow-leafed false wallflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Descurainia incisa subsp. filipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to make teas, salves, and topical creams.
